$comment: Demo registry consumed by gallery /api/catalog. status: available | coming-soon. needs: capability tokens checked against SLV — 'asr'/'tts' (backend ready), 'asr.<cap>'/'tts.<cap>' (capability list membership; 'tts.voice_clone' also honors supports_voice_cloning).

description.zh: 设备能力总览、模型切换中心与各演示入口。
description.en: Device capability overview, model switch center and entry to all demos.

description.zh: 对着麦克风说话，字幕逐字上屏，展示首字延迟与语言自动检测。
description.en: Speak into the mic and watch captions appear word by word, with first-token latency and auto language detection.

description.zh: 选音色、拖语速/音高，流式播放并实时显示 TTFA。
description.en: Pick a voice, drag speed/pitch sliders, stream playback with live TTFA readout.

description.zh: 完整语音对话（支持打断），逐阶段展示 ASR/LLM/TTS 延迟。
description.en: Full voice-to-voice chat with barge-in, per-stage ASR/LLM/TTS latency bars.

description.zh: 多人对话实时字幕按说话人上色，并统计各人发言占比。
description.en: Multi-speaker live captions colored per speaker, with talk-time share stats.

description.zh: 录 10 秒你的声音，让设备用你的音色念任意文本。
description.en: Record 10 seconds of your voice and have the device read any text in your voice.
